- [TAP5-325](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-325) – Pop up error bubbles are broken in Safari
- [TAP5-326](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-326) – Class org.apache.tapestry5.internal.structure.BlockImpl should implement toString()
- [TAP5-328](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-328) – Exception when checking BeanEditor Field required in ValidationDecorator
- [TAP5-332](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-332) – Service interfaces should identify the service name and the type of service configuration (if applicable)
- [TAP5-333](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-333) – Tapestry 5 renders an XHTML label element incorrectly
- [TAP5-337](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-337) – Rapidly refreshing a page, even the same page, can cause a deadlock related to class loading
- [TAP5-342](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-342) – Form with a zone is getting an action of "#" on submit from IE 6
- [TAP5-343](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-343) – The Grid component generates non-unique HTML DOM ids for sort columns
- [TAP5-359](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-359) – Use of the email validator with client-side validation displays a pop-up error message about client-side validator "email" being missing

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.2"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-3"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAP5-12](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-12) – Need better docs for AjaxFormLoop; component should link to AddRowLink and RemoveRowLink, and need some examples
- [TAP5-49](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-49) – Grid.defaultModel() should be a protected method so that subclasses can override the default BeanModel logic
- [TAP5-87](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-87) – PasswordField should not update its value parameter when the submitted value is blank
- [TAP5-184](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-184) – Improve error reporting when a javascript asset is intended to be included on page which has no <html> element
- [TAP5-187](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-187) – Ajax event handler methods that return a page instance, page class or page name should cause the client to redirect to that page
- [TAP5-188](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-188) – Document the need to use @Inject with @Value or @Symbol when the parameter/field type is String (to avoid injecting the service id)
- [TAP5-190](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-190) – Grid component's source parameter should autoconnect to the matching container property
- [TAP5-197](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-197) – Improved error message when using a form control component outside of a Form component
- [TAP5-200](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-200) – The Submit component doesn't need validation decoration
- [TAP5-205](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-205) – Add an empty parameter to the Loop component, to display a message when there are no items to loop over
- [TAP5-206](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-206) – Document that you should not instantiate an @Persist field in its declaration
- [TAP5-228](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-228) – When you have multiple forms on the same page that share (some of) the same properties, it is not possible to differentiate validation constraints and messages in the message catalog
- [TAP5-254](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-254) – Translation for Spanish
- [TAP5-282](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-282) – Add support for Brazilian Portuguese (pt\_BR) locale
- [TAP5-285](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-285) – Components such as ActionLink and EventLink should require that there be \*some\* event handler for their triggered events
- [TAP5-297](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-297) – Provide access to the Autocompleter javascript instance
- [TAP5-301](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-301) – When using the @Property annotation, Tapestry should throw an exception rather than overwrite an existing method
- [TAP5-313](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-313) – Provide configuration to move links to JavaScript libraries to the top of the page
- [TAP5-318](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-318) – Tapestry should identify where in the template undefined components (with id, but no type or matching embedded component) are located
- [TAP5-339](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-339) – Make FileItemFactory a service so it can be overridden
- [TAP5-344](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-344) – Quickstart archetype should include an empty app.properties message catalog in the WEB-INF folder

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAP5-41](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-41) – Create a guide to creating and packaging component libraries
- [TAP5-231](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-231) – Unify injection; allow @Inject annotation on fields of service implementations
- [TAP5-275](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-275) – Add set() method to TestBase to allow private fields of objects to be set via reflection

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-taskscompleted.2"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tasks-completed-3"></a>

### Tasks Completed

- [TAP5-164](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-164) – Remove link to TapIDEA project from Tapestry home page
- [TAP5-322](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAP5-322) – Update links to JumpStart because its site has moved

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.15"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.15"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.15

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-sub-taskscompleted"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--sub-tasks-completed"></a>

### Sub-tasks Completed

- [TAPESTRY-2423](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2423) – Add Short Translator

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.4"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-5"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1796](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1796) – Not all writeCookieValue functions honor the tapestry.default-cookie-max-age symbol
- [TAPESTRY-1856](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1856) – Add localization support to DateField
- [TAPESTRY-2243](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2243) – Component report crashes when project have too many dependencies
- [TAPESTRY-2324](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2324) – Wrong Submit 'selected' event fired when using a Form with a Zone parameter
- [TAPESTRY-2352](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2352) – Client side validation does not enforce the format of input (i.e., that numeric fields contain numbers)
- [TAPESTRY-2357](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2357) – Unlike Tapestry 4, Tapestry 5 does not automatically position the cursor into a form
- [TAPESTRY-2438](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2438) – ValidationException thrown from onValidateForm() should be recorded for the Form, but instead is treated as an unexpected error
- [TAPESTRY-2453](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2453) – Form enctype is not updated when an Upload component is injected via FormInjector / AjaxFormLoop
- [TAPESTRY-2460](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2460) – Nested BeanEditors (where the block parameter for a property to one BeanEditor contains another BeanEditor) results in a StackOverflowException
- [TAPESTRY-2517](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2517) – A failed service injection into a component field is visible in the browser as a spurious error about field \_$resources
- [TAPESTRY-2532](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2532) – Javadoc of inPlace field in Grid class is incomplete
- [TAPESTRY-2536](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2536) – Add explicit message on module loading failure
- [TAPESTRY-2546](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2546) – Any component always outputs the same id attribute, rather than a unique id attribute for each render
- [TAPESTRY-2558](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2558) – The injection page of the user guide references commons-logging Log, not SLF4 Logger
- [TAPESTRY-2559](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2559) – The "configuration" page of the Tapestry user guide (conf.apt) has an error, comes out blank
- [TAPESTRY-2561](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2561) – Rapidly refreshing a page, even the same page, can cause a deadlock related to class loading
- [TAPESTRY-2563](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2563) – Tapestry should reject form submissions that aren't via POST or don't contain t:formdata, as likely hack attempts
- [TAPESTRY-2566](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2566) – Errors in code examples of "Securing your application with HTTPS"
- [TAPESTRY-2567](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2567) – Tapestry doesn't identify conflicting annotations on component fields
- [TAPESTRY-2578](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2578) – BeanDisplay formatting is off for fields with empty values
- [TAPESTRY-2585](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2585) – Email validator requires Void constraint type, should be null
- [TAPESTRY-2591](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2591) – Email Validator Throws MissingFormatArgumentException
- [TAPESTRY-2595](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2595) – Application State Objects are not persisted back to the session at the end of the request
- [TAPESTRY-2601](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2601) – ComponentResources.createActionLink() is incorrectly named, should be createEventLink()
- [TAPESTRY-2602](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2602) – Error bubbles are in some cases placed incorrectly
- [TAPESTRY-2606](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2606) – File system warning for certain component event request, on windows only
- [TAPESTRY-2617](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2617) – DateField component should localize the month names and day name abbreviations shown in the client web browser
- [TAPESTRY-2619](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2619) – Event Handler adds a new JSONObject to my JSONObject return
- [TAPESTRY-2626](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2626) – Dependencies on Selenium are incomplete
- [TAPESTRY-2629](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2629) – Link to tapestry5-annotations page is broken, links to old page (out of date since May 2008)
- [TAPESTRY-2636](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2636) – NoSuchElementException on submit when using a Grid with a non-default model inside a Form
- [TAPESTRY-2641](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2641) – FormSupport.defer() javadoc says defered actions will be executed after validation, but it's executed before
- [TAPESTRY-2655](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2655) – Services defined with the bind() method may conflict with services from service builder methods without error
- [TAPESTRY-2656](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2656) – GridSortModel.getSortContraints() - method name misspelled, should be getSortConstraints()
- [TAPESTRY-2658](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2658) – HibernateGridDataSource.getAvailableRows should also call applyAdditionalConstraints() to prevent java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException
- [TAPESTRY-2664](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2664) – RenderSupport.addScript(String) does not add the core JavaScript dependencies
- [TAPESTRY-2668](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2668) – Setting volatile to true on Grid component in form results in NullPointerException
- [TAPESTRY-2669](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2669) – Tapestry source distribution's version of tapestry-test is actually the code for tapestry-spring

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.3"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-4"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-2137](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2137) – The common idiom of connecting a component's id to a container property should be easier: an attribute of the @Parameter annotation
- [TAPESTRY-2223](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2223) – Don't require a hibernate.cfg.xml
- [TAPESTRY-2236](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2236) – Strip trailing punctuation (\_ and $) from member names, as is done with leading punctuation
- [TAPESTRY-2277](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2277) – Removing Label body should be parameterizable
- [TAPESTRY-2286](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2286) – Support JSONArray as a valid return type from AJAX event handlers
- [TAPESTRY-2287](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2287) – Include tapestry-test in release download
- [TAPESTRY-2363](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2363) – Overload method ComponentSource.getPage to accept a page class as parameter
- [TAPESTRY-2458](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2458) – Refactor DefaultHibernateConfigurer as an IOC service for easier overriding
- [TAPESTRY-2461](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2461) – Add translations for Finnish locale
- [TAPESTRY-2474](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2474) – Define and use a standard set of SL4J Markers for logging, to make it easier to filter output
- [TAPESTRY-2486](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2486) – Refactor the non-trivial BindingFactory implementations into services
- [TAPESTRY-2489](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2489) – The ServiceStatus page should not reveal so much information in production mode, out of security concerns
- [TAPESTRY-2554](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2554) – When decorating a service using a decorate method, the underlying service (or interceptor) should be available as a parameter of the service type, not just java.lang.Object
- [TAPESTRY-2576](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2576) – The text field for a DateField component should be optional
- [TAPESTRY-2577](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2577) – Add support for Russian locale
- [TAPESTRY-2584](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2584) – AspectInterceptorBuilder should allow for multiple advice per method
- [TAPESTRY-2586](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2586) – Some abstract base class methods should be overridable
- [TAPESTRY-2588](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2588) – Add translations for Danish locale
- [TAPESTRY-2589](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2589) – Add translations for Swedish locale
- [TAPESTRY-2592](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2592) – BeanEditor should provide a "BeanEditContext" into the environment. (or PropertyEditContext should include the bean class).
- [TAPESTRY-2596](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2596) – Add translations for French locale
- [TAPESTRY-2597](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2597) – Upgrade tapestry-hibernate to Hibernate 3.3.0.SP1
- [TAPESTRY-2603](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2603) – Improve @InjectContainer Javadoc
- [TAPESTRY-2610](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2610) – Allow access to component's informal parameters
- [TAPESTRY-2611](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2611) – Add loom-t5 link to Tapestry 5 home page
- [TAPESTRY-2615](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2615) – IOC autobuild conflict between org.hibernate.Session and the FullTextSession from the hibernate serach module
- [TAPESTRY-2623](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2623) – Remove excessive Tapestry.debug() messages on zone response
- [TAPESTRY-2624](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2624) – Remove unecessary comments from tapestry.js
- [TAPESTRY-2627](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2627) – The else parameter of If should have a default binding prefix of literal
- [TAPESTRY-2630](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2630) – EntityPersistentFieldStrategy converts entity PKs to strings and back unnecessarily
- [TAPESTRY-2639](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2639) – tapestry.js does not use Protoype's Class.create() properly
- [TAPESTRY-2643](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2643) – RenderSupport should have options for including a JavaScript library or Stylesheet as a String URL, not just as an Asset
- [TAPESTRY-2646](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2646) – There should be a global configuration that controls the default for Form's clientValidation and autofocus parameters
- [TAPESTRY-2654](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2654) – The Zone component should expose its body (as a Block) to make it easier to re-render the Zone's body as an Ajax partial page render
- [TAPESTRY-2662](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2662) – Upgrade Hibernate dependency to 3.3.1
- [TAPESTRY-2670](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2670) – Major fixes needed for German (DE) localization
- [TAPESTRY-2671](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2671) – TapestryFilter should display name of application, version of Tapestry at startup

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.1"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-2"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-1310](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1310) – Provide access to the current row index and current column index in Grid
- [TAPESTRY-1867](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1867) – Support a special marker interface @Local to select just services defined within the same module
- [TAPESTRY-1923](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1923) – ComponentClassResolver can/should provide access to all known page names
- [TAPESTRY-2300](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2300) – The RadioGroup component always generates its control name from its component id; a new parameter should give some override control over this
- [TAPESTRY-2509](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2509) – Add type coercions from String to Renderable, Block
- [TAPESTRY-2541](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2541) – Tapestry DOM needs basic methods to manipulate the DOM post-render
- [TAPESTRY-2571](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2571) – Add configuration to turn off the automatic creation of ValueEncoders for Hibernate entities
- [TAPESTRY-2594](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2594) – Add translations for Croatian (hr) locale
- [TAPESTRY-2638](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2638) – The name of the event triggered by a Submit component should be configurable, to allow for multiple components that trigger the same event handler method
- [TAPESTRY-2644](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2644) – Add a ComponentResources.createPageLink(...) method that uses page class instead of page name

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-wishlistitemscompleted"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--wish-list-items-completed"></a>

### Wish List Items Completed

- [TAPESTRY-1964](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1964) – Constant not used from app-name in TapestryModule

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.14"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.14"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.14

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.5"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-6"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1588](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1588) – Validation error images are included in the markup for fields without errors, even when the form has client validation disabled
- [TAPESTRY-1997](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1997) – PersistentLocale is lower-casing locales
- [TAPESTRY-2181](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2181) – The Component Parameters Report should indicate if a component supports informal parameters
- [TAPESTRY-2384](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2384) – OutOfMemoryError exception if a regular file with no extension exists in a known component package
- [TAPESTRY-2386](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2386) – BeanDisplay component should generate more semantic output using <DL>, <DT>, <DD> instead of nested <DIV>s
- [TAPESTRY-2390](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2390) – Components or mixins requiring external javascript files and rendered via AJAX do not work
- [TAPESTRY-2408](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2408) – FormInjector doesn't work properly if the content contains multiple form elements
- [TAPESTRY-2429](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2429) – Script text added by RenderSupport.addScript() should be added raw (with XML elements not encoded as entities)
- [TAPESTRY-2433](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2433) – UTF8 characters are not supported in the autocomplete mixin
- [TAPESTRY-2447](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2447) – Clicking on a pop-up error bubble hides the bubble, then immediately fades it back in
- [TAPESTRY-2448](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2448) – When a bean class inherits properties from a base class, field annotations of the base class properties are not visible
- [TAPESTRY-2449](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2449) – Groovy can inject a base class into component classes that Tapestry rejects
- [TAPESTRY-2450](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2450) – Unlike reflective access (via PropertyAdapter), PropertyConduit does not make field annotations visible
- [TAPESTRY-2454](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2454) – tapestry-hibernate transaction management doesn't work as expected when commiting more than once on the same request
- [TAPESTRY-2459](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2459) – Submit components fires its event after "validateform" event, should be before (this is a change from prior releases)
- [TAPESTRY-2460](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2460) – Nested BeanEditors (where the block parameter for a property to one BeanEditor contains another BeanEditor) results in a StackOverflowException
- [TAPESTRY-2468](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2468) – A deadlock related to class loading (and creation) can occur
- [TAPESTRY-2471](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2471) – Parameter fields that are updated during component event processing (such as a form submit) may not clear their values at the end of the request
- [TAPESTRY-2473](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2473) – Application locks up, with all threads waiting for read lock inside ConcurrentBarrier
- [TAPESTRY-2476](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2476) – Unhelpful exception messages when a null value is bound to a required parameter
- [TAPESTRY-2478](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2478) – Non-private fields in Tapestry component classes should fail early, instead get confusing javassist.bytecode.DuplicateMemberException
- [TAPESTRY-2481](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2481) – ClassTransformation acts as if all type-level annotations are inherited; it should filter out non-inherited annotations
- [TAPESTRY-2483](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2483) – The '%' symbol passed to RenderSupport.addScript() is treated as a formatting directive, causing errors
- [TAPESTRY-2484](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2484) – Some built-in Tapestry components are final and should be extensible
- [TAPESTRY-2490](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2490) – Palette component forces an unwanted form submit under FireFox 3
- [TAPESTRY-2498](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2498) – Add JDK 1.6 compatibility via Javassist 3.8.0.GA
- [TAPESTRY-2500](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2500) – Using @PageActivationContext on an int field results in a java.lang.Verify error
- [TAPESTRY-2501](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2501) – Form input not correctly decoded in case of non-english charsets
- [TAPESTRY-2502](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2502) – When the GridDataSource reports more available rows than actual rows (due to race conditions with updates), the Grid will fail because of IndexOutOfRange exceptions
- [TAPESTRY-2504](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2504) – Unspecified ajax stream response encoding
- [TAPESTRY-2507](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2507) – Stylesheet (.css) files included by components are not added if the component is added to the page via an ajax update
- [TAPESTRY-2508](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2508) – HibernateGridDataSource calls Query.setFetchSize() not Query.setMaxResults()
- [TAPESTRY-2522](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2522) – RequestPathOptimizer will corrupt query parameters in the optimized URL if the parameters container slashes
- [TAPESTRY-2528](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2528) – It should not be possible for component classes to be directly instantiated
- [TAPESTRY-2538](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2538) – The default binding prefix for TextField.translate should be "translate" but is "prop"
- [TAPESTRY-2543](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2543) – Simplify Tapestry to use UTF-8 (or another, configurable character set) across the entire application

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.4"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-5"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-2404](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2404) – PropertyConduitSource could build a shared method to "navigate" to the final property
- [TAPESTRY-2410](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2410) – Service decorator method not invoked for @Match with "\*" in middle
- [TAPESTRY-2443](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2443) – Support de\_DE (German) localization
- [TAPESTRY-2452](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2452) – Introduce a new symbol for the path to the application message catalog
- [TAPESTRY-2461](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2461) – Validation and Error messages for Finnish locale
- [TAPESTRY-2467](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2467) – Method to remove or replace DOM nodes from the document
- [TAPESTRY-2469](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2469) – Update Selenium dependency to the current version, 1.0-beta-1
- [TAPESTRY-2479](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2479) – Upgrade to SLF4J version 1.5.2 (supports older versions of Log4J better)
- [TAPESTRY-2480](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2480) – Migrate Tapestry "what's new?" and upgrade information up to the project level
- [TAPESTRY-2519](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2519) – Make ClassNameLocatorImpl resolve resources from URLs that use a client-defined protocol
- [TAPESTRY-2525](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2525) – Properties files in a message catalog should be read using UTF-8 encoding, rather than default encoding
- [TAPESTRY-2531](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2531) – Upgrade EasyMock dependency to latest version, 2.4
- [TAPESTRY-2534](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2534) – An event context should be passed through the Ajax request when AjaxFormLoop adds a new row

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.2"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-3"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-1810](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1810) – ServiceBinder.bind() with an interface should check to see if there's an Impl class and bind to that.
- [TAPESTRY-2143](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2143) – Framework should include an email validator
- [TAPESTRY-2217](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2217) – Add ability to render a page as a Document
- [TAPESTRY-2235](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2235) – Annotation for managing a property as the page activation context
- [TAPESTRY-2475](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2475) – Add an implementation of GridDataSource that can be used to optimize Hibernate queries
- [TAPESTRY-2540](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2540) – Tapestry should place the Registry into the ServletContext using a well-known attribute name, for use by non-Tapestry code
- [TAPESTRY-2542](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2542) – Add new method hasBody() to ComponentResources, to reveal if component has a body or not
- [TAPESTRY-2550](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2550) – Allow Tapestry to bind a service interface to a ServiceBuilder callback to create the service
- [TAPESTRY-2552](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2552) – Provide easier overrides for Grid, BeanEditor property display & edit blocks

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.13"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.13"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.13

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.6"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-7"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-2096](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2096) – Confusing exception when autobuilding a class fails due to class visibility
- [TAPESTRY-2311](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2311) – "Parents before Child" concept for Component Rendering does not allow different rendering in subclasses
- [TAPESTRY-2341](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2341) – AJAX Zone updating doesn't work correctly in IE
- [TAPESTRY-2349](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2349) – FormFragment should be tied to the 'click' event of the associated checkbox
- [TAPESTRY-2360](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2360) – Forms in zones in loops have wrong zone id after update
- [TAPESTRY-2418](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2418) – Form onsubmit event handler for Zone component handling is ignored if any fields on the form have validation configured.
- [TAPESTRY-2422](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2422) – The Exception report will itself throw an exception if the exception being reported contains a write-only property
- [TAPESTRY-2436](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2436) – New FormInjectorDemo using AjaxFormLoop fails if a row is added and then removed without a form submission in between

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.5"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-6"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-2100](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2100) – Validation and Error messages for Portuguese locale
- [TAPESTRY-2281](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2281) – Update tutorial1 to correctly indicate how and why to replace Jetty 5 log4j.jar
- [TAPESTRY-2347](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2347) – Add a "resources" section to T5 home page
- [TAPESTRY-2393](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2393) – The FormFragment component should isolate its action stream (t:formdata hidden field) such that the entire client-side element may be removed
- [TAPESTRY-2428](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2428) – tapestry-hibernate should include as a dependency a default version of Hibernate with docs for how to override
- [TAPESTRY-2439](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2439) – The PropertyAdapter interface should include a property to identify the containing class
- [TAPESTRY-2440](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2440) – The quickstart archetype should enable debug logging (by default) for the new application
- [TAPESTRY-2441](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2441) – Upgrade to Scriptaculous 1.8.1
- [TAPESTRY-2442](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2442) – When Tapestry is operating inside FireFox with Firebug enabled, it should use the Firebug logging API

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.12"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.12"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.12

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.7"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-8"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1921](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1921) – Add documentation for Environmental annotation, environmental services
- [TAPESTRY-2037](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2037) – NullPointerException caused by many rapid page refreshes
- [TAPESTRY-2247](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2247) – Transactions should roll back, not commit, at the end of each request
- [TAPESTRY-2258](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2258) – Error while autobuilding BeanEditForm's bean
- [TAPESTRY-2259](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2259) – Registry startup exceptions are not reported correctly
- [TAPESTRY-2260](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2260) – Null relationships cause an NPE inside Hibernate when being value encoded by RadioGroup
- [TAPESTRY-2261](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2261) – TriggerFragment mixin should work with Radio as well as Checkbox components
- [TAPESTRY-2262](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2262) – TriggerFragment mixin will run the "show" animation even when the fragment is already visible
- [TAPESTRY-2265](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2265) – Grid component documentation could be simplified
- [TAPESTRY-2267](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2267) – Services that are dependencies of other EagerLoad services may not be eagerly loaded
- [TAPESTRY-2268](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2268) – Docs: tapestry-core -> user guide -> Request Processing broken "Pipelines" link
- [TAPESTRY-2271](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2271) – Expose the Grid's rowsPerPage and row properties to Java code (instead of using @Property)
- [TAPESTRY-2276](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2276) – Required validation fails when used with select and blankOption="ALWAYS"
- [TAPESTRY-2284](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2284) – Exceptions may be incorrectly reported due to exception invoking initCause() when an exception already has a cause
- [TAPESTRY-2293](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2293) – BeanDisplay formatting is off for fields with null values
- [TAPESTRY-2305](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2305) – When Tapestry throws an exception due to an unrecognized embedded component id, it fails to list the available component ids
- [TAPESTRY-2306](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2306) – Mismatch between client-side and server-side "required" validator
- [TAPESTRY-2320](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2320) – Problems with validation popups on Internet Explorer
- [TAPESTRY-2322](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2322) – FormInjector doesn't work properly if the content contains multiple elements
- [TAPESTRY-2323](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2323) – Select component does not generate client-side validation
- [TAPESTRY-2333](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2333) – RequestPathOptimizer generates invalid URLs when a trailing slash is added to the request path
- [TAPESTRY-2336](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2336) – default.css div.t-autocomplete-menu ul style shouldn't have width, height & margin-left
- [TAPESTRY-2338](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2338) – Cached values for methods annotated with @Cached do not reset at end of Ajax request
- [TAPESTRY-2339](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2339) – The automatic ValueEncoder for Hibernate entities will sometimes encode an entity as null (rather than its primary key)
- [TAPESTRY-2340](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2340) – Documentation about informal parameters should reference the @SupportsInformalParameters annotation specifically
- [TAPESTRY-2343](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2343) – The FormInjector should copy its class attribute to the new element (on the client side)
- [TAPESTRY-2346](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2346) – Update the tapestry-core adaptive API example to match the current set of events triggered by the Form component
- [TAPESTRY-2368](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2368) – The value for the Tapestry version number symbol is not initialized correctly and is always "UNKNOWN"
- [TAPESTRY-2370](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2370) – When injecting a component into a field and the type is not a match the exception report is not sufficiently helpful
- [TAPESTRY-2371](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2371) – The QuickStart Archetype should lock down the version of Jetty used (to 6.0, now that 7.0 snapshots are starting to turn up)
- [TAPESTRY-2372](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2372) – The Tapestry tutorial should disable production mode (so that the full exception report can be seen)
- [TAPESTRY-2381](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2381) – Linking a radio button as a FormFragment trigger does not work in Internet Explorer
- [TAPESTRY-2397](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2397) – Mixins inside components should have an id that extends from from the containing component, but is still unique and URL safe
- [TAPESTRY-2398](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2398) – ClassTransformation.addInjectedField() adds fields as protected which can cause exceptions due to visibility
- [TAPESTRY-2399](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2399) – When an class loader exeption occurs while loading a base class, a new exception (int the subclass) overwrites the more useful exception from the base class
- [TAPESTRY-2400](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2400) – Advising a method where the parameter type or return type is the class containing the advised method may throw a java.lang.VerifyError
- [TAPESTRY-2401](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2401) – NullPointerExceptions inside component bindings need to do a better job of explaining what was null
- [TAPESTRY-2407](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2407) – Update master POMs to point to the moved OpenQA repositories (from which Selenium is obtained)
- [TAPESTRY-2409](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2409) – Service method advice fails when a parameter or return value type is an array
- [TAPESTRY-2415](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2415) – StreamResponse does not work on WebLogic - response not flushed, and secondary exception raised
- [TAPESTRY-2416](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2416) – When the HibernateValueEncoder is unable to convert a primary key into an entity, it should log an error
- [TAPESTRY-2424](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2424) – Validation occasionally triggers Stack Overflow Javascript Error in IE

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.6"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-7"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-1924](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1924) – Allow for templates coming from stream
- [TAPESTRY-2159](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2159) – YSlow Recommendation: Version bundled javascript and use far-future expires header
- [TAPESTRY-2253](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2253) – A brain dead implementation of toString() on a custom data object can cause the Required validator to throw a NullPointerExcepton
- [TAPESTRY-2263](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2263) – Add a reset() method to the Grid component to reset paging and sorting to initial defaults
- [TAPESTRY-2280](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2280) – Add a zone parameter to the BeanEditForm component
- [TAPESTRY-2285](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2285) – Tutorial #1 talks about "setup()" method instead of "initialize()"
- [TAPESTRY-2294](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2294) – The various link components should only generate an id attribute if the id parameter is bound
- [TAPESTRY-2297](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2297) – Element should expose namespace URL in which the element is defined
- [TAPESTRY-2308](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2308) – Don't create HttpSession when persisted property is null
- [TAPESTRY-2315](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2315) – InjectContainerWorker should use this or other local variable name than "container"
- [TAPESTRY-2327](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2327) – The Any and FormInjector components should have an element parameter, for overriding the element name
- [TAPESTRY-2334](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2334) – Optimize JavaScript generation for FormInjector
- [TAPESTRY-2342](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2342) – The InjectPageWorker should use the ComponentSource service, rather than the RequestPageCache
- [TAPESTRY-2354](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2354) – Use "flash" persistence on Form's ValidationTracker
- [TAPESTRY-2364](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2364) – YSlow Recommendation: Write Scripts at bottom of page
- [TAPESTRY-2388](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2388) – The Any component should implement the ClientElement interface, and allocate a unique client id as necesssary

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.3"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-4"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-2231](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2231) – Make Tapestry release number visible as a symbol ("tapestry.version")
- [TAPESTRY-2256](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2256) – Provide an annotation to support automatic committing of the transaction after a component or service method invocation
- [TAPESTRY-2319](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2319) – Add support for client-side form-level validation
- [TAPESTRY-2359](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2359) – Grid component should be able to update itself in place using an implicit Zone
- [TAPESTRY-2365](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2365) – It should be possible to create decorators without directly writing Javassist code
- [TAPESTRY-2378](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2378) – Add a listener interface for MarkupWriter, to allow code to be notified when elements are started and ended
- [TAPESTRY-2379](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2379) – FormInjector and FormFragment should use the (new) MarkupWriterListener interface to place the hidden field(s) in an appropriate location
- [TAPESTRY-2380](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2380) – Add AjaxFormLoop component
- [TAPESTRY-2389](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2389) – Add support to ClassTransformation to allow ComponentClassTransformWorkers to provide advice to methods
- [TAPESTRY-2405](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2405) – Add @Log annotation for component methods, that will log (at debug level) entry, exit and fail conditions
- [TAPESTRY-2421](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2421) – Allow Tapestry4/Tapestry5 to be deployed in the same WAR
- [TAPESTRY-2425](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2425) – Tapestry annotations such as @Validate, @DataType, etc. should be applicable to fields as well as accessor methods

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.11"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.11"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.11

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.8"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-9"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1475](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1475) – Tapestry is missing an API for clearing out persistent properties of a particular page
- [TAPESTRY-1605](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1605) – The request encoding (for component action requests) occurs too late; after query parameters of the request have been accessed, which prevents the proper request encoding from being used
- [TAPESTRY-1780](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1780) – T5 Form component NPE if no FORM\_DATA found
- [TAPESTRY-2103](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2103) – When referencing a method as part of a property expression, the method name must be case exact whereas the rest of the property expression is case insensitive
- [TAPESTRY-2108](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2108) – Tapestry.onDOMLoaded not working in konqueror
- [TAPESTRY-2117](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2117) – Circular @SubModule will crash the IOC container with OutOfMemoryException
- [TAPESTRY-2141](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2141) – NullPointerExceptions under JDK 1.5 due to underlying ThreadLocal bug
- [TAPESTRY-2145](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2145) – Documentation (including javadoc), refers to "ZoneEffects" instead of "ZoneEffect"
- [TAPESTRY-2147](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2147) – Typo in Tapestry developer "bible"
- [TAPESTRY-2149](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2149) – Tapestry should allow the pages and components to be referenced by their "unstripped" names as well
- [TAPESTRY-2150](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2150) – Tapestry should recognize pages that are "nested" beneath other pages
- [TAPESTRY-2151](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2151) – Date format used by DateField shows the year as two digits, not four
- [TAPESTRY-2172](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2172) – DateField component shows up misplaced in major browsers
- [TAPESTRY-2177](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2177) – Conversion of context parameters to server-side objects uses the TypeCoercer rather than the correct ValueEncoder
- [TAPESTRY-2184](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2184) – Null pointer exception when creating an action link during a component event request
- [TAPESTRY-2188](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2188) – GridModel and GridDataSource should be changed to support multiple sort columns
- [TAPESTRY-2190](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2190) – JSONObjectEventResultProcessor sends the wrong content type value
- [TAPESTRY-2192](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2192) – DateField.xdoc:65:11: The element type "p" must be terminated by the matching end-tag "</p>"
- [TAPESTRY-2206](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2206) – Tapestry should have a different data type for numbers than for strings
- [TAPESTRY-2208](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2208) – The data type "checkbox" should be renamed to "boolean" to reflect what it is, rather than how it is rendered
- [TAPESTRY-2209](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2209) – JSONObject response contains additional {}
- [TAPESTRY-2212](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2212) – Index.tml generated by Quickstart Archetype is broken due to recent Index page change.
- [TAPESTRY-2219](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2219) – Enum label overrides, as outlined in the Tapestry Tutorial, no longer work
- [TAPESTRY-2220](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2220) – In some cases, component event requests are incorrectly interpretted as render requests (with a page activation context)
- [TAPESTRY-2221](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2221) – Exception message when a context value is null or blank is confusing
- [TAPESTRY-2226](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2226) – Requests for the root index page that include a page activation context fail with a 404 error
- [TAPESTRY-2229](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2229) – BeanEditForm is including properties that are read only, causing errors when the form is submitted
- [TAPESTRY-2238](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2238) – Returning a Block from an Ajax form submission fails with IllegalStateException
- [TAPESTRY-2240](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2240) – Groovy classes can no longer be used as component classes because of the public metaClass field
- [TAPESTRY-2245](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2245) – GridDataSource getAvailableRows() method called inefficiently

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.7"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-8"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-1336](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1336) – Refactor ApplicationGlobals's store methods
- [TAPESTRY-1612](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1612) – Allow access to the PageTester registry
- [TAPESTRY-1835](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1835) – Need an API to see if a field is required or optional
- [TAPESTRY-1890](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1890) – Allow Tapestry applications to NOT autoload modules from library
- [TAPESTRY-1930](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1930) – Render missing parameter names in different font and/or text style.
- [TAPESTRY-1932](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1932) – Extend PropertyModel to allow access to annotations associated with the property
- [TAPESTRY-1954](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1954) – Move the ClassNameLocator service to the tapestry-ioc module
- [TAPESTRY-1955](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1955) – Hibernate SessionFactory close on webapp destroy
- [TAPESTRY-1978](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1978) – When supplying an empty parameter binding, indicate problem parameter in error message.
- [TAPESTRY-1983](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1983) – Add parameter to Grid component that will add additional columns to the BeanModel
- [TAPESTRY-1999](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1999) – Allow the context for an event to be specified as a List as well as an Object array
- [TAPESTRY-2078](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2078) – More understandable error messages needed when incorrect classes found in component/page packages
- [TAPESTRY-2087](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2087) – Add "else" parameter to Unless component.
- [TAPESTRY-2164](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2164) – The Tapestry binary distribution should include appropriate third party dependencies
- [TAPESTRY-2173](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2173) – When Tapestry must instantiate an Application State Object without an explicit ApplicationStateCreator, it should autobuild the object rather than just use the default constructor
- [TAPESTRY-2180](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2180) – Add release notes about API changes
- [TAPESTRY-2182](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2182) – NullPointerExceptions, due to reading nested properties that do not suppress null values, do not indicate problematic expression for AbstractPropertyOutput derivatives
- [TAPESTRY-2200](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2200) – Need a mechanism via which display and/or edit BeanBlocks may be overridden
- [TAPESTRY-2204](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2204) – Upgrade tapestry-test to use Selenium 0.9.2
- [TAPESTRY-2205](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2205) – Upgrade to Javassist 3.7
- [TAPESTRY-2218](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2218) – Grid component should render informal parameters
- [TAPESTRY-2222](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2222) – The exception report should highlight the lines related to the application in the stack trace
- [TAPESTRY-2227](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2227) – Typo in User Guide -> Persistent Data -> Persistence Strategy
- [TAPESTRY-2237](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2237) – Grid should make its "currentPage" value available to containing components

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.4"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-5"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-1653](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1653) – Provide automatic ValueEncoders for Hibernate entities
- [TAPESTRY-1778](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1778) – Allow extending the PageTester with extra modules for better integration with tapestry-spring
- [TAPESTRY-1919](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1919) – Let Tapestry control HTTP/HTTPS in links via page configuration
- [TAPESTRY-2169](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2169) – Create an ExceptionAnalysisDisplay component
- [TAPESTRY-2170](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2170) – Add annotation to inject a component defined in the template
- [TAPESTRY-2197](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2197) – Support for "index" pages in packages
- [TAPESTRY-2202](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2202) – When the BeanEditForm or BeanEditor components must create the bean to be editted, it should be autobuilt (supporting injection) rather than just instantiated via the default constructor
- [TAPESTRY-2214](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2214) – Select component should provide control over a blank option for optional selects
- [TAPESTRY-2216](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2216) – Add a @Property annotation for fields to create a getter and setter method
- [TAPESTRY-2241](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2241) – Add new parameter "include" to BeanEditor, Grid, etc. to limit properties to a provided list, and rename existing "remove" parameter to "exclude"
- [TAPESTRY-2244](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2244) – Add @Cached annotation for caching method values
- [TAPESTRY-2246](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2246) – Add @Persist strategy for Hibernate entities

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-taskscompleted.3"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tasks-completed-4"></a>

### Tasks Completed

- [TAPESTRY-1933](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1933) – Setup infrastructure for integration tests in tapestry-hibernate
- [TAPESTRY-2162](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2162) – Update roadmap on site

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.10"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.10"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.10

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.9"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-10"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1518](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1518) – Add support for JDK 1.5 Generics when defining pages and accessing bean properties
- [TAPESTRY-1594](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1594) – tapestry-upload processes requests with multipart content even if Tapestry doesn't recognize the page
- [TAPESTRY-1727](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1727) – Exception report page doesn't display object arrays very nicely
- [TAPESTRY-1850](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1850) – Hibernate Sessions are not being closed at the end of the request
- [TAPESTRY-1853](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1853) – Create a guide to using the Grid component
- [TAPESTRY-1901](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1901) – Grid component calls prepare() and getRowValue() with incorrect values after items are removed
- [TAPESTRY-1969](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1969) – Error messages in Errors component are misaligned in Internet Explorer 7
- [TAPESTRY-2027](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2027) – AbstractIntegrationTestSuite does not allow custom selenium browser selection
- [TAPESTRY-2048](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2048) – Tapestry default.css includes a bad rule for the autocomplete mixin's styles
- [TAPESTRY-2052](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2052) – Disabled fields still perfom client side validation
- [TAPESTRY-2054](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2054) – page activation context with spaces are incorrectly decoded when using forms
- [TAPESTRY-2061](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2061) – tapestry-component-report reports only components with parameters
- [TAPESTRY-2080](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2080) – PageRenderRequestFilter's service() method should throw IOException as PageRenderRequestHandler does
- [TAPESTRY-2083](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2083) – Using @Inject with a primitive field fails with a "cannot find constructor" transformation error
- [TAPESTRY-2085](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2085) – When a user submit a form with a TextField and the value is missing or blank, the value null is passed through the component to the model property
- [TAPESTRY-2088](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2088) – ClassNotFoundException when passing an int[] parameter to a component
- [TAPESTRY-2089](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2089) – File upload does not ever invoke FileCleaner.exitWhenFinished()
- [TAPESTRY-2094](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2094) – Exception when creating service MultipartDecoder prevents the use of the Upload component
- [TAPESTRY-2095](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2095) – Incorrect optimization for requests that contain a colon but do not contain a slash
- [TAPESTRY-2099](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2099) – Contribution to PartialMarkupRenderer should be named "Heartbeat" not "Heatbeat"
- [TAPESTRY-2112](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2112) – Tapestry should use ValueEncoders, not simple type coercion, to convert between event context values, URL strings, and event method handler parameters
- [TAPESTRY-2118](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2118) – ComponentReport.extractSubpackage throws ArrayOutOfBoundException
- [TAPESTRY-2128](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2128) – If-Modified-Since always returns not modified for js and css in jar files

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.8"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-9"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-1416](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1416) – Add support for programatically adding new columns to a Grid
- [TAPESTRY-1642](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1642) – When the Label component has a body, it should render that rather than using the field's label
- [TAPESTRY-1887](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1887) – Extend the AbstractLink class to provide access to the clientId and disabled flag, as well as to the URL
- [TAPESTRY-2036](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2036) – Add a parameter to the Output component to add control over whether output is filtered or unfiltered
- [TAPESTRY-2040](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2040) – Allow subclasses of the Autocomplete mixin greater control over the JSON and markup rendered to the client
- [TAPESTRY-2081](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2081) – It should be possible to override a Grid column header as easily as overriding a Grid cell
- [TAPESTRY-2097](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2097) – Render exceptions should identify the components that are actively rendering
- [TAPESTRY-2101](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2101) – DateField icon should be configurable
- [TAPESTRY-2134](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2134) – Add a link to InterLDAP project
- [TAPESTRY-2142](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2142) – Document the Layout component pattern
- [TAPESTRY-2144](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2144) – Upgrade to Prototype 1.6.0.2

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.5"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-6"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-1843](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1843) – Tapestry should have a "production mode" (vs. development mode)
- [TAPESTRY-2002](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2002) – Add annotations to easily set content type and response encoding
- [TAPESTRY-2009](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2009) – Add examples to component reference
- [TAPESTRY-2076](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2076) – Component report should break out as one class per page and include examples
- [TAPESTRY-2084](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2084) – Add control over whether whitespace is stripped from templates by default

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-taskscompleted.4"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tasks-completed-5"></a>

### Tasks Completed

- [TAPESTRY-1851](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1851) – Extend scripts and Ant build.xml to make rolling out a release easier
- [TAPESTRY-2069](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2069) – Replace LGPL JavaScript calendar with a properly licensed one

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.9"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.9"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.9

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.10"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-11"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-2074](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2074) – Tapestry fails with URISyntaxException when the project folder contains spaces

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.9"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-10"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-1647](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1647) – Need to be able to render elements before and after form labels

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.6"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-7"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-1724](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1724) – Add ability for pages to be notified about errors within themselves so that they can override the default error handling behavior

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.8"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.8"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.8

*Release not made public due to TAPESTRY-2074*

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.11"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-12"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1315](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1315) – Context expression without period results in StringIndexOutOfBoundsException
- [TAPESTRY-1377](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1377) – NullPointerException invoking methods on the Request service
- [TAPESTRY-1546](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1546) – Add inheritInformalParameters flag to the @Component annotation
- [TAPESTRY-1595](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1595) – Add support for ignoring paths that belong to other servlets in the web application
- [TAPESTRY-1598](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1598) – Tapestry should not require explicit value encoders (via the encoder parameter) where it can automatically coerce the value between string and the appropriate server-side type
- [TAPESTRY-1600](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1600) – Cannot render XML from page templates: XML declaration and namespaces are removed
- [TAPESTRY-1636](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1636) – Template reloading in Tomcat doesn't work
- [TAPESTRY-1713](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1713) – Tapestry doesn't run correctly on Websphere 6.1 due to an incorrect implementation of HttpServletRequest.getServletPath()
- [TAPESTRY-1823](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1823) – It is not possible to create a reasonable implementation of RequestExceptionHandler without importing internal interfaces and services
- [TAPESTRY-1840](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1840) – Tapestry 5 does not compile with Java 6
- [TAPESTRY-1849](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1849) – There are two virtually identical PersistentLocaleImpl classes, one unused (probably an incomplete refactoring)
- [TAPESTRY-1880](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1880) – DateField component should support editting of time as well as date
- [TAPESTRY-1926](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1926) – DateField disabling does not work
- [TAPESTRY-1941](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1941) – ValidationTracker retaining field values inconsistently
- [TAPESTRY-1948](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1948) – Null pointer exception when performing a partial page render
- [TAPESTRY-1957](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1957) – EnumValueEncoder missing null check when converting to client value
- [TAPESTRY-1984](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1984) – Error occurs with a multipart (file upload) request if the request encoding is null
- [TAPESTRY-1988](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1988) – Page activation paremeter with escaped ( %2f ) slash ( " / " ) character not passed correctly
- [TAPESTRY-2005](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2005) – Using component classes as component parameters fails (Could not find a coercion)
- [TAPESTRY-2007](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2007) – PNG images related to validation render poorly in IE
- [TAPESTRY-2013](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2013) – BeanEditor does not support informal parameters
- [TAPESTRY-2017](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2017) – AssetDispatcher doesn't stream asset when the 'If-Modified-Since' header can't be converted to a date
- [TAPESTRY-2019](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2019) – Autocompleter mixin now fails with a NullPointerException
- [TAPESTRY-2028](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2028) – Mimimize whitespace in the output markup
- [TAPESTRY-2033](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2033) – Optimized requests paths are broken for root paths within contexts
- [TAPESTRY-2044](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2044) – Component action requests are not capable of handling the case where the active page and the page containing the component are different

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.10"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-11"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-1478](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1478) – Validation messages for zh\_CN locale
- [TAPESTRY-1502](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1502) – Generated URLs should be relative to request base URL
- [TAPESTRY-1599](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1599) – Make it possible to differentiate between preparing for a Form render vs. preparing for a Form submission
- [TAPESTRY-1639](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1639) – Components that generate hyperlinks (ActionLink, PageLink, EventLink) should have a getLink() method to retrieve the link as generated
- [TAPESTRY-1671](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1671) – Need a way to redirect to external URLs
- [TAPESTRY-1739](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1739) – Add byte, short and float Translators
- [TAPESTRY-1802](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1802) – Add documentation for the intended project layout
- [TAPESTRY-1818](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1818) – Template parser should handle CDATA blocks
- [TAPESTRY-1830](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1830) – Add ability to store temporary data without having to define new properties
- [TAPESTRY-1940](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1940) – Italian translation of messages for Error component, and validation
- [TAPESTRY-1991](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1991) – It should be easier to access an Application State Object without forcing its creation
- [TAPESTRY-2008](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2008) – Validation popup bubbles are somewhat distracting, should be simplified
- [TAPESTRY-2012](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2012) – Add BeanEditor support for data types "password" and "longtext"
- [TAPESTRY-2014](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2014) – ComponentResources should expose the page's lifecycle to interested listeners
- [TAPESTRY-2021](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2021) – It should be possible to turn off the generation of CSS classes for table headers and table cells inside a Grid
- [TAPESTRY-2049](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2049) – Avoid reflection when instantiating component instances
- [TAPESTRY-2056](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2056) – Add configurable null handling for text fields
- [TAPESTRY-2057](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2057) – Add EventLink component that can create a link that triggers an arbitrarily named event in its container

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.7"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-8"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-1526](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1526) – Strip the folder name used to identify libraries from logical page names, just as the subfolder is stripped
- [TAPESTRY-1847](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1847) – Grid component should output additional CSS classes into TDs to identify first and last column, first and last row
- [TAPESTRY-2006](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2006) – Replace naive page pool mechanism with a more realistic one that can handle larger sites
- [TAPESTRY-2042](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-2042) – Make it possible to merge action requests with rendering, as with Tapestry 4

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.7"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.7"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.7

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.12"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-13"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1541](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1541) – Can't find page with same name as parent folder
- [TAPESTRY-1608](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1608) – Some documentation pages link to the out-of-date PDF tutorial, rather than the current HTML tutorial
- [TAPESTRY-1627](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1627) – Start page redirect requests can return an empty response.
- [TAPESTRY-1723](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1723) – tapestry-upload does not use character encoding
- [TAPESTRY-1745](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1745) – Palette javascript errors in Internet Explorer
- [TAPESTRY-1748](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1748) – Field validators continue to generate client-side JavaScript even though the Form is configured to not do client-side validation
- [TAPESTRY-1816](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1816) – Some tapestry-ioc tests fail on IBM JDK due to subtle differences in JDK implementations
- [TAPESTRY-1834](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1834) – Fields not rewritten when modifying existing methods
- [TAPESTRY-1838](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1838) – Palette javascript Error when an item contains a quote
- [TAPESTRY-1863](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1863) – Tapestry should verify that marker annotations have retention type runtime
- [TAPESTRY-1864](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1864) – Code sample in documentation on how to add a new property editor incorrect
- [TAPESTRY-1871](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1871) – Null date displayed in a Grid raises error
- [TAPESTRY-1879](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1879) – PageLink does not have an anchor parameter
- [TAPESTRY-1882](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1882) – Formatted messages are not localized properly
- [TAPESTRY-1922](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1922) – EJB3 Beans can not be referenced as properties inside JBoss 4.0
- [TAPESTRY-1925](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1925) – Obscure exception when a Collection (not a List) is used as a GridDataSource
- [TAPESTRY-1934](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1934) – Tapestry should enforce that component classes only extend from other (transformed) component classes, or java.lang.Object
- [TAPESTRY-1936](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1936) – Non-null return value from form action event causes exception
- [TAPESTRY-1937](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1937) – If a single module contains more than one integration test (subclass of AbstractIntegrationTestSuite), then the second one fails
- [TAPESTRY-1943](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1943) – Site menu is the same on all pages
- [TAPESTRY-1947](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1947) – Mangled URLs that should result in standard 404 error pages are instead resulting in a Tapestry exception report
- [TAPESTRY-1949](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1949) – Component action requests where the action context contains a period are not parsed correctly leading to request failures
- [TAPESTRY-1951](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1951) – "No ClassLoaders found for" exception
- [TAPESTRY-1952](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1952) – The "match any event" feature for the OnEvent handler is not useful and should be removed
- [TAPESTRY-1966](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1966) – Non-private/non-static fields in a page should be an exception, not a warning
- [TAPESTRY-1975](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1975) – Template parser is insufficiently picky about component ids

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-improvementsmade.11"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--improvements-made-12"></a>

### Improvements Made

- [TAPESTRY-1360](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1360) – Add a @Width annotation to set the width of input fields generated by BeanEditForm
- [TAPESTRY-1576](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1576) – Getting access to the created configuration
- [TAPESTRY-1862](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1862) – Change Tapestry to be compatible with Eclipse/Maven Plugin 0.0.11
- [TAPESTRY-1897](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1897) – Upgrade to Javassist 3.6 for improved JDK 1.6 support
- [TAPESTRY-1900](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1900) – Allow multiple markers annotations per service
- [TAPESTRY-1903](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1903) – Upgrade to Prototype 1.6 / Scriptaculous 1.8
- [TAPESTRY-1917](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1917) – Tapestry should list available pages, components and mixins at startup, and when classes change
- [TAPESTRY-1918](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1918) – Tapestry's reload logic should be able to see additions, not just deletions and changes
- [TAPESTRY-1935](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1935) – Create an annotation to add a CSS stylesheet to the rendered page
- [TAPESTRY-1942](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1942) – Client side validation should be triggered when the user moves out of a field
- [TAPESTRY-1973](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1973) – Tapestry 5 Tutorial Improvements
- [TAPESTRY-1990](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1990) – More flexibility for specifying timeouts and other time periods in minutes, seconds, etc. rather than milliseconds

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-newfeaturesadded.8"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--new-features-added-9"></a>

### New Features Added

- [TAPESTRY-1476](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1476) – Component events for input translation and validation
- [TAPESTRY-1509](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1509) – Create an annotation to add a static JavaScript library to the rendered page
- [TAPESTRY-1829](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1829) – Allow @Marker annotation on module classes, to automatically mark all services of that module with the annotation
- [TAPESTRY-1860](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1860) – Extend ObjectLocator to create a proxied, autobuilt service
- [TAPESTRY-1891](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1891) – Tapestry IoC Service Proxies should be serializable
- [TAPESTRY-1931](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1931) – Add an annotation to allow explicit setting of property types
- [TAPESTRY-1994](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1994) – Allow easy override of the default Tapestry stylesheet

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-taskscompleted.5"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tasks-completed-6"></a>

### Tasks Completed

- [TAPESTRY-1914](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1914) – Nightly build broken inside quickstart module

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-tapestryversion5.0.6"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--tapestry-version-5.0.6"></a>

## Tapestry Version 5.0.6

<a id="release-notes-50--releasenotes5.0-bugsfixed.13"></a>
<a id="release-notes-50--bugs-fixed-14"></a>

### Bugs Fixed

- [TAPESTRY-1328](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1328) – Support for form elements inside a Grid
- [TAPESTRY-1345](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1345) – Exception generated when a page does not have a template is confusing: "No root element has been defined."
- [TAPESTRY-1389](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1389) – Coercion to numeric types does not check for null
- [TAPESTRY-1417](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1417) – CSS classes on text input fields are discarded when field is in error
- [TAPESTRY-1471](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1471) – Controlling the order of properties within a BeanModel is too complex and needs an improved API
- [TAPESTRY-1506](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1506) – Add support for anchors when generating links
- [TAPESTRY-1597](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1597) – When a List is converted to a SelectModel, the keys are converted unnecessarily to strings
- [TAPESTRY-1604](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1604) – Attributes of elements do not have entity values quoted (including the " character itself) resulting in invalid markup
- [TAPESTRY-1606](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/TAPESTRY-1606) – Anchor-Links in "Component Index" web page for T5 doesn't work with FireFox
